snippet.title: Jagame Thandhiram | Teaser | Dhanush, Aishwarya Lekshmi | Karthik Subbaraj | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Podu t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ ̶t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ Rakita Rakita. 

Catch Dhanush as Suruli in Jagame Thandhiram, coming soon to Netflix. 

Netflix Presents “Jagame Thandhiram”
A YNOT Studios & Reliance Entertainment Production. 
A Suruli 2019 Film Limited Production.

Starring Dhanush, James Cosmo, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Kalaiyarasan, Joju George and others.

Written & Directed by Karthik Subbaraj

Produced by S. Sashikanth
Co-Produced by Chakravarthy Ramachandra

Music - Santhosh Narayanan
DOP - Shreyaas Krishna
Art Directors - T. Santanam, Vinoth Rajkumar (UK)
Editor - Vivek Harshan
Lyrics : Vivek, Poetu Dhanush, Arivu, Anthony Dasan & Madurai Babaraj
Stunts - Dinesh Subbarayan
Choreography - M Sherif, Baba Baskar
Line Producers - Muthuramalingam, Sudipto Sarkar (UK)
Production Executive - Rangaraj
Sound Design - Kunal Rajan
Sound Mix - M R Rajakrishnan
Costume Design - Praveen Raja 
Chief Make-Up Artist - A Sabari Girison
Costumer - Subier
DI & VFX - Accel Media
DI Colorist - Suresh Ravi
Publicity Design - Tuney John (24AM)
Publicity Stills - V S Anandhakrishna
Stills - Murugan
PRO - Nikkil

YNOT - Head of Distribution - Kishore Tallur
YNOT - Head of Operations - Pranav Rajkumar

Direction Team - Bala, Purushoth, Bharath, Dhakshi, Karthik, Shylam, Vigneswaran, Jagadish, Somitharan, Praveen, Srinivasan & Suresh

♬♬ Music On - Sony Music Entertainment

snippet.title: MAZAA | B Praak | Jaani | Arvindr K | New Hindi Songs 2021 |Gurmeet | Hansika | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
"There is no love without forgiveness and there is no forgiveness without love"

"Mazaa" is a song about confession, love, betrayal, regret, and forgiveness from beloved... 

Saregama Originals Presents "Mazaa" in the voice of "B Praak" featuring Gurmeet Choudhary and Hansika Motwani. The song is composed by "B Praak", lyrics penned by Jaani and directed by Arvindr Khaira.

Audio Credits:
Singer& Music By: B Praak
Lyricist & Composer: Jaani 
Video: Arvinder Khaira 
Presentation by: Dilraj Nandha 

Team:- 
Creative director:- Amrinder Singh 
Music Themes Designed By B Praak
Arranged&Programmed By Kartik dev Gaurav Dev 
Flute By Paras Nath
Violin By Manas 
Mix&Mastered By Gurjinder&Akash
B Praak Costume by: Mayurkataria
Assistant Director: Satnam Singh, Jais Sivia, Sukhman Singh
Production by: Third eye films (Faheem Rahiman) Dubai

Hansika Motwani Team:  
Hairstylist: Savita Dnyanoba Sankpal 
Makeup Artist: Reshma Merchant 
Costume: Pranab Sood
BTS team: Paul Davidson 

Line production - Vikrant kaushik, Adesh Gola, Arun Paharia 
Mumbai Production - Anuj Tiwari

#BPraak
#Mazaa
#Jaani 
#ArvindrKhaira 
#SaregamaMusic

Lyrics:
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Baho Mein So ke, Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon ki Bahi Mein So Ke – 2
Bhatak gaye the hum Ek Shaam ko, kiya hai kharaab kharaab tere naam ko
Kyun Dil Teda Todha yeh poochne humse sapne mein mere khuda aaya…

Dariya Yeh Dariya Dariya Na Hota , Na Hota Jo Iska Kinara
Aqal Thikane aayi hamari tumse bichad kar o yaara – 2
Raat ko Nikla tha teri gali se, thokar main kha kar subah aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Yeh Ghalti Thi Akhari Mauka de de na mujh ko tu Saaki,
Ab tere pairon mein kaatnge jitni bhi zindagi hai baaki – 2
Jaani ke andar jo Jaani Awaara tha Jaani who khud hi Jala aa gaya
Maine Dekha Hai Gairon Ki Bahi Mein, Sach Sach batayein Mazza aa gaya,
Tu Tu Hai Meri Jaan koi tujh sa koi na, yeh unki jo Khushboo samjha gaya…

Also, listen to the song on: 
Gaana:https://gaana.com/album/mazaa
JioSaavn: http://bit.ly/37EnmVG
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/t8jBiqRa2
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/2P4qXWA
Hungama: http://bit.ly/3uq0pPx
Amazon Prime Music: https://amzn.to/37EnN2g
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJde2HrB/

snippet.title: Actor Jaggesh Reaction On Actor Darshan Matter
snippet.description:
Actor Jaggesh Reaction On Actor Darshan Matter | ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ : ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್

ನಾನು ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿಲ್ಲ. ನನ್ನ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಷಡ್ಯಂತ್ರ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ನಾನು ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಆಡಿಯೋ ಕಟ್​​ ಮಾಡಿ ವೈರಲ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆದ್ರೂ ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್ ಹೇಳಿದರು.

Kaaton karein nadaniyan
Je mann’na ae tan mann ja ve
Nai peke jaani aa

Ladna tan andar ladna
Karke nabede rakhi ve

Eh tera mera rishta na kalla jismani aa

Bahon tu fadke rok la
Jo mere andar paldi oh teri nishani aa

snippet.title: Suryaputra Mahavir Karna - Official Movie Logo | Vashu Bhagnani | Jackky Bhagnani | RS Vimal
snippet.description:
Presenting the official logo of our magnum opus 'Suryaputra Mahavir Karna'!

'Mahabharata' is one epic tale that has inspired many film-makers around the globe. However, barely any scripts are presented on the celluloid from Suryaputra Mahavir Karna's perspective. Bringing this story alive for the first time ever on the big screen by producers Vashu Bhagnani, Deepshikha Deshmukh, and Jackky Bhagnani.

The multilingual project is written and directed by R S Vimal. This film will be the most distinguished and grand production from Pooja Entertainment till date.

India's celebrated poet Dr. Kumar Vishwas will pen the dialogues and additional screenplay of the film. 

'Suryaputra Mahavir Karna' will be made in Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, and Malayalam and is all set to redefine the genre of opulent period dramas in the Indian film industry.

#SuryaputraMahavirKarna #KumarVishwas #PoojaEntertainment #VashuBhagnani #JackkyBhagnani #Epic #Mahabharata #Karna

Music & Background Music: KP
Sound Design: Rajakrishnan MR

Musicians Credits-
Keyboards & Rhythm programming: Chinna, Kalyan, KP
Vocals: Kapil Kapilan, Lavita Lobo, Nakul Abhyankar, Chinna, KP
Trumpet, Trombone & French Horn: Babu
Recording engineer: Avinash @20DB Studios
Musicians coordinator: B.Manikandan 
Music Advisor: Mastan Vali 
Mixed and Mastered by Nakul Abhyankar

Follow us on:
YouTube : http://bit.ly/PoojaEntertainmentOfficial
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pooja_ent/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PoojaEntOfficial/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/poojafilms

snippet.title: Main Sharabi | Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam | SR | Rajeev Raja | New Hindi Song | SR Brothers
snippet.description:
SR Brothers Presenting :) A New Heart Touching Love Story Video Song On  "Main Sharabi" (Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam ) Song Which Is Beautifully Sung  By "Rajeev Raja & Nizami Brothers" And  Featured By Sachin Rao (SR),Suraj Tiwari & Shikha Tiwari . Chess Is A Recreational And Competitive Board Game Played Between Two Players.  Just like That There Is Always A Competition Between Hero And Villain But Who Pays The Proper Attention, Be  Loyal And Kind Can Win The Battle Of Life . So That's We Are Presenting A Conceptual Revenge Love Story Which Contains Drama, Love Story, Action, Tragedy And Some Thrills.This Video Is Written By Satish & SR , Directed & Produce By Sachin Rao (SR) .'LIKE' if you Love this Video Song.

Follow Us On Instagram :https://www.instagram.com/iam.sr_​​

Mai na peeta to bat kuch bhi na thi

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj |  Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Thiruvannamalai Parai Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

localized.description:

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

snippet.title: My First Car - Unveiling with family - Irfan's view
snippet.description:
#FirstCar #SuperCar #Irfansview

I am very much happy to announce you all that I bought my first car. This is the first car in my whole life and it gives me immense pleasure to show you all guys. We went to Route 66 where they sell a pre-owned luxury cars, and we saw many cars there. I decided to get a BMW M3 series as I was much impressed with the car.  I have come this far with all your supports and my hard work. I didn't even know that I will buy a normal car in my life, but the almighty showered his countless blessing on me. Lyrics of "Deewane Hum Nahi" - 

Yun na parda kar..
Ab to Aja mere Samne.. 
Tera hun mai.. 
Meri har Saansien .. 
Tera naam Lein..

Behki behki nigahien.. 
Dhundhe tere raste.. 
Ati hai to lejati.. 
Meri har shikayetien.. 

Lehron ki behti hai vo.. 
Chalti shaan se hai hatke.. 
Kaatil ye Rukh Tera.. 
Hai Kaatil har Ada.. 

Deewane Hum Nahi hote.. 
Deewani raat Aati hai..
Mohabbat ki Nahi jati.. 
Mohabbat aazmati hai.. 

Kisiki aankhon se.. 
Kisiki baton se.. 
Kisiki chahat ke.. 
Kisiki aadat se.. 

Haye re dil ko satati hai..
Bohot Zyada tadpati hai.. 

OoooOoo... 

Ishq Vishq main ulajh gaya vo.. 
Chod ke duniya Daari..
Bhul gaya vo Khul ke Jeena.. 
Raat nashe vich Mari... x2

Mangta hai vo dua.. 
Qubool Karo Al Baari
Doob Gaye Sab rahi Dar pe.. 
Aaj bhi qissa zaari.. 

Lehron ki behti hai vo.. 
Chalti shaan se hai hatke.. 
Kaatil ye Rukh Tera.. 
Hai Kaatil har Ada.. 

Deewane Hum Nahi hote.. 
Deewani raat Aati hai..
Mohabbat ki Nahi jati.. 
Mohabbat aazmati hai.. 

Kisiki aankhon se.. 
Kisiki baton se.. 
Kisiki chahat ke.. 
Kisiki aadat se.. 

Haye re dil ko satati hai..
Bohot Zyada tadpati hai.. .

snippet.title: School Reopen Prachanaigal | School Life | Veyilon Entertainment
snippet.description:
Veyilon Entertainment presents “School Reopen” - a Tamil comedy on school life during the times of Corona. The teacher is worried because the class is empty, and there’s half attendance for online classes.

Are the students of class 12th commerce bunking the class? Did the teacher enter the right classroom? Why is the principal angry with the teacher?

Watch the 12th grader going back to school after the lockdown in this video.

If you like the video, subscribe to Veyilon Entertainment.

#Schoolreopen #Schoollife #Veyilonentertainment

snippet.title: क्यों है Jetha की दुकान On Sale? -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता- Ep 3108 -23rd Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/gokuldham-without-jethalal-1000109034?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3108: Jethalal's Shop On Sale
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal has decided to sell his shop so he calls Bagha to inform about it. Bagha gets shocked after knowing this but Jethalal makes him understand that this is the only option left and asks Bagha to stick a board of Shop on sell in front of Gada Electronics. Bagha and Magan get emotional while sticking that board. Why Jethalal is selling his shop?. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now on SonyLiv.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Bombay Masala Toast Sandwich Recipe - मुंबई आलू सैंडविच (चटनी मसाला के साथ) - cookingshooking
snippet.description:
#BombayMasalaToast #XpertDishwashBar #CookingShooking

Bombay Masala Toast ya Mumbai Aloo Sandwich ki recipe share kar raha hu dosto, street style me banayenge chutney aur sandwich masala ki recipe ke saath.

Hum sabhi khana banate hai toh Haldi aur Jale Bhune Masalo ke daag bartano pe lag jate hai, Xpert Dishwash Bar me hai Double Action formula jo in dago ko chakachak saaf kar deta hai aur ye Aam Hare Bar se 50% kam galta hai. Iske 40 Rs ke pack mai ate hai 3 Bars do green Scrubber aur ek steel Scrubber jo ki apke pure mahine ki bartano ki safai ke liye kafi hai.
#XpertDishwashBar#Xpert #DoubleAction #CleanUtensils

CookingShooking ko jarur subscribe karein -  https://goo.gl/MH3A4r

Instagram me follow jarur karein - https://www.instagram.com/cooking.shooking

English videos - https://goo.gl/Sxk4Fp

Gas Toaster - https://amzn.to/2ODR5U1

Ingredients: 
For Chutney: 
Coriander - 1 Bunch / 2 cups loosely filled
Mint Leaves - 15-20
Green Chilli - 4
Lemon juice - 1 tsp
Garlic - 5-6 cloves
Dessicated Coconut - 3 tbsp 
Salt - to taste
Water - to grind

For Alu Masala
Oil - 1 tbsp
Mustard Seeds - 1 tsp
Curry Leaves - 7-8
Adrak - 1/2 inch Crush Karke
Hari Mirch - 2 Crush Karke
Lehsun - 4 cloves Crush Karke
Chopped Coriander - 3 tbsp
Haldi powder - ½ tsp
Boiled Potato - 5 
Salt - to taste
Lemon Juice - 1 tsp

Sandwich ke lie - 
Bread - 12 (6 sandwich ke lie)
Soft Butter - 75g (for 6 sandwiches)
Cucumber Slices,  Tomato Slice, Capsicum Slice, Boiled Beetroot Slice
Nylon Sev - serving ke lie
Cheese Cube / Slice - 6 

Sandwich Masala ke lie:
Jeera - 2 tsp
Saunf - 1 tsp
Kali Mirch - 1/2 tsp
Chat Masala - 2 tsp
Salt - 1 tsp
Lal Mirch Powder - 1/2 tsp



Kitchen Products
Measuring Cup & Spoon Set - https://amzn.to/2KZBVpq
Chopper for Fine Cutting - https://amzn.to/2UCCo7X
Mixer Grinder - https://amzn.to/2XTI1jW 
Power Blender for Smoothie, Shakes - https://amzn.to/37ozHM6
Hand Blender+Mixer+Chopper - https://amzn.to/2MOHjhL
Gas Sandwich Griller - https://amzn.to/37mvfgW
Good NonStick Pan - https://amzn.to/2zl0hsa (steel spoon safe)
Kitchen Weight Scale - https://amzn.to/2ug3G65 
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2N2wzuf (keep in freezer)
Instant Yeast - https://amzn.to/2KZSkdn (small pack)
Pizza Screen - https://amzn.to/2m4zpn6 (3 pack - 6,7,8 inches)
Parchment Paper - much better than butter paper, and it is reusable - https://amzn.to/2MZFGvC
Whipping Cream - https://amzn.to/2ugPB8m
Oven For Baking - https://amzn.to/2udP3A5 (28liter Good for 3-4 people)

snippet.title: कुछ तो कर यूं ही मत मर | Motivational Story Of RJ Kartik | @Rj Kartik  | Josh Talks Hindi
snippet.description:
⭐👇 क्या आप भी बड़े सपने देखते है? ⭐👇
इन सपनो को आप साकार कर सकते है जोश के नए App जोश Skills के साथ!
DOWNLOAD NOW: https://joshskills.app.link/93ydcCoK6db 

00:00 Introduction
1:11 Kahaani Ki Shuruwat
2:40 Life Changing Moment
4:44 Radio K Saath Judaav
5:43 Zindagi Ka Yadgaar Pal
6:34 Struggle Ka Asli Matlab
8:32 Worst Phase Of Life
9:26 Pehli Job Mili
10:58 New Journey Of Life
12:56 Message For Us


जिंदगी में हम सब Big dreams देखते है और कुछ अलग करना चाहते है लेकिन अपने Dreams को Achieve करने के लिए जरूरी है Self help.
आज की जोश Talks पर हम आपको एक ऐसी ही कहानी लेकर आये हैं जो आपको सिखाएगी कि अगर life में confusion है आप career को लेकर focused नहीं हो तो कैसे self help के जरिये आप इन सब से बाहर निकल सकते हो. 
 @Rj Kartik  का मन पढाई में नहीं लगता था .कार्तिक अपनी 11th में फेल भी हो गए थे लेकिन उनके पापा ने हमेशा उन्हें सिखाया कि How To Dream Big. कार्तिक ने जब ये सफर शुरू किया तब उन्हें Money Problems भी झेलनी पड़ी लेकिन कार्तिक ने  अपने सारे Struggles को हराकर आखिर success हासिल कि और Radio कि दुनिया से लेकर Youtube और Social Media कि दुनिया में अपनी एक अलग पहचान बना दी -


RJ Kartik is an award-winning Radio Jockey and Motivational storyteller. He is known for creating motivation stories content on his YouTube channel named "RJ Kartik"
In his younger days, Kartik used to listen to the radio and follow the RJs. That was when he decided that he wanted to be an RJ when Kartik grew up. 
He started my career as an intern with My FM Jaipur in November 2009. Post the internship, He worked elsewhere before rejoining My FM Jaipur. 
On today's Josh Talks, we have brought you the Story of Rj Kartik that will teach you that if there is confusion in life or you are not focused on your career, then how can you get out of all this through self-help? 
Kartik had also failed in his 11th but his father always taught him how to dream big. When Karthik started this journey, he also had to face money problems but Karthik finally got success after defeating all his Struggles and made a different identity in the world of Radio to Youtube and Social Media today we are going to learn many important lessons of life-

RJ Kartik is an award-winning Radio Jockey and Motivational storyteller. He is known for creating motivation stories content on his YouTube channel named “RJ Kartik”

localized.title: कुछ तो कर यूं ही मत मर | Motivational Story Of RJ Kartik | @Rj Kartik  | Josh Talks Hindi
localized.description:
⭐👇 क्या आप भी बड़े सपने देखते है? ⭐👇
इन सपनो को आप साकार कर सकते है जोश के नए App जोश Skills के साथ!
DOWNLOAD NOW: https://joshskills.app.link/93ydcCoK6db 

00:00 Introduction
1:11 Kahaani Ki Shuruwat
2:40 Life Changing Moment
4:44 Radio K Saath Judaav
5:43 Zindagi Ka Yadgaar Pal
6:34 Struggle Ka Asli Matlab
8:32 Worst Phase Of Life
9:26 Pehli Job Mili
10:58 New Journey Of Life
12:56 Message For Us


जिंदगी में हम सब Big dreams देखते है और कुछ अलग करना चाहते है लेकिन अपने Dreams को Achieve करने के लिए जरूरी है Self help.
आज की जोश Talks पर हम आपको एक ऐसी ही कहानी लेकर आये हैं जो आपको सिखाएगी कि अगर life में confusion है आप career को लेकर focused नहीं हो तो कैसे self help के जरिये आप इन सब से बाहर निकल सकते हो. 
 @Rj Kartik  का मन पढाई में नहीं लगता था .कार्तिक अपनी 11th में फेल भी हो गए थे लेकिन उनके पापा ने हमेशा उन्हें सिखाया कि How To Dream Big. कार्तिक ने जब ये सफर शुरू किया तब उन्हें Money Problems भी झेलनी पड़ी लेकिन कार्तिक ने  अपने सारे Struggles को हराकर आखिर success हासिल कि और Radio कि दुनिया से लेकर Youtube और Social Media कि दुनिया में अपनी एक अलग पहचान बना दी -


RJ Kartik is an award-winning Radio Jockey and Motivational storyteller. He is known for creating motivation stories content on his YouTube channel named "RJ Kartik"
In his younger days, Kartik used to listen to the radio and follow the RJs. That was when he decided that he wanted to be an RJ when Kartik grew up. 
He started my career as an intern with My FM Jaipur in November 2009. Post the internship, He worked elsewhere before rejoining My FM Jaipur. 
On today's Josh Talks, we have brought you the Story of Rj Kartik that will teach you that if there is confusion in life or you are not focused on your career, then how can you get out of all this through self-help? 
Kartik had also failed in his 11th but his father always taught him how to dream big. When Karthik started this journey, he also had to face money problems but Karthik finally got success after defeating all his Struggles and made a different identity in the world of Radio to Youtube and Social Media today we are going to learn many important lessons of life-

snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1180 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Virat is unable to regain his memory, he mistakes Heer for someone else and lashes out at her. So Heer decides to walk away from his life for good. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: KATTEY | MRUNAL SHANKAR | KALAMKAAR
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe: https://bit.ly/KalamkaarYT

Song - KATTEY | MRUNAL SHANKAR 

Audio Credits: 
Artist - Mrunal Shankar
Performed by - Mrunal Shankar
Music produced by - Dhruvan Moorthy
Composed and written by - Mrunal Shankar
Traditional lyrics and rap by - Mrunal Shankar
Label - Kalamkaar

Video Credits: 
Directed by - Canfuse 
Associate director - Riddhi Hadkar
Editor - Riddhi Hadkar 
Colourist - Canfuse 
Line producer - Goldy khandait 
Assist - Kishan Kanojia 
Production manager : Akshay Shirkar 
BTS photographer : Akash Singh

Follow Mrunal Shankar on :
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mrunal.shankar/
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/mrunaldhole9/ 

Follow us on : 
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/kalamkaarmusic
Website - http://www.kalamkaarmusic.com

Digital Partner - Believe Digital
For licensing enquiries - 
Email - sync-india@believedigital.com

Team Believe -
Shilpa Sharda
Srikanth Seshadri
Shimantini Gupta
Sneha Panday

Lyrics: 
(Hook)
Sawariyon ghat Mai re,
Ramaiyon ghat Mai

Thane kattey thane kattey
Thane kattey thane kattey
..........

(Verse)
Bade dino Baad aayi hu aaj main rap krne 
Mujhe kehne do
Dil ki har baat baat aur beat khaas use behne do
Beheno Ko mera Salam aur bhai log Ko bhi pranam
Mera Mrunal hai Naam kaam ke saath jaam mujhe bharne do

Mai "MAGAN" hu "XTC" me chalna sambhalke tu "IT'S A TRAP" !!
"DIL-E-PATANG" ude "MERI MARZI" se man I cut the crap
I give cardiac attack make you go react, post a storm & then I relax 
Jab bola maine "KARKE DIKHAEGI",
I meant it bro no cap!

"Walk it like I talk it"
I don't like it, I don't like it
Ye sab cheezen "desi rap" me nahi karti I go 4/4 
Jara kar do gaur, kaun kamjor aur kaun kathor
Haan, Kise jaldi hai top karne ki,
 aur kaun kar raha seedha score 
Ground floor se, 
Hai Pad rahe shot kaunse
Who's here for the long ride 
And who's gonna leave after foreplay!
Kaun Gandhi kaun Godse,
Poocho hip-hop ke God se.
Jo basta hai un sab me 
jo zinda hai music ke shor se

(Hook)
Sawariyon ghat Mai re,
Ramaiyon ghat Mai
Thane kattey thane kattey
Thane kattey thane kattey
Thane kattey dhundawa jau re
Sawariyon ghat maa
Ooo,.. jiyo..  

(Verse)
Patari pe aa rahaa jeewan badla jab maine doston Ko 
Peeche chhoote aur naye, alag alag do stock ho
Wo 'Moriarty' hum 'Sherlock Holmes', oh please, now Don't stalk hoe!
I've released new shit again I'm never Done, 
walk home!

bas dedh saal pehli Baat hai, daala tha maine pehle rap
Tabse hai Jaana khud se gaane banana IT'S A TRAP!
Sambhalke, chal chal ke thak gayi hu yed bhag gayi hai lat lag gayi hai lat lag gayi hai
Mujhe gaano ki lat lag gayi hai, lat -
Alfaazon se krneki fingering, 
Ye saali Kalam hi ban gayi meri finger ring!
Sajaati hu usko Anamika par, 
aur Kuchh logon ke liye madhyama meri oopar hi 

I've started afresh pehle thi dusron ke gaane gaati,
Fir bhi  Filhal Main hu un sab se aage kaafi
Kyunki shayad jyadatar logon se jyada sellable multi syllables bin bhi meri gaadi behtar bhagi!
Honhaan hathiyar  mere yaaar sab
Hai sahukaar shabdon ke Aur hai hip-hop rab 
Naya Naam sound krta south indian पण आहे मराठी रक्त, 
Mrunal Shankar Naam mera yaad rakh!

(Hook)
Thane kattey dhundawa jau re
Sawariyon ghat maa
Ooo,.. jiyo..  
Thane kattey thane kattey
Thane kattey thane kattey

Sawariyon ghat Mai re,
Ramaiyon ghat Mai,
Thane kattey thane kattey
Thane kattey thane kattey

Audio on Kalamkaar Music Pvt. Ltd. (C) 2021

#Kattey #MrunalShankar #Kalamkaar #DesiRap #DesiHipHop

snippet.title: The LADAKH Tent | World’s 1st Solar Heated Military Tent | Made in India | Sonam Wangchuk
snippet.description:
SOLAR HEATED MILITARY TENT 
for #indianarmy at #galwanvalley
+15 C at 10pm.  Minimum outside last night was -14 C,
Uses only sunlight, water and insulated layers to maintain temperature.
Replaces tons of kerosene fuel, pollution, emission and #climatechange.
Designed for 8 to 10 soldiers, it is fully portable for difficult terrains.  Each part weighs less than 30 Kgs. 
#MadeInIndia #MadeInLadakh #CarbonNeutral

Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Rubina Opens Up On Her Relationship with Jasmin, Rahul & Talks About Getting Scolded By Salman Khan
snippet.description:
Bigg Boss 14 Winner, Rubina Dilaik in a candid conversation with CNN News18's Shweta Rashmi spoke about her BB journey. She spoke about how the show mentally affected her, what was Salman Khan's contribution to her journey, and how she tried many times to mend her relationship with Jasmin Bhasin. 
#RubinaDilaik #JasminBhasin #SalmanKhan

► A Glimpse of the Interview 00:00
►On Winning Bigg Boss 14 01:40
► On The Importance Of Mental Health 03:33
► On Jasmin 07:59
► On Rahul Vaidya 12:45
► On Salman Khan 14:32

localized.title: Rubina Opens Up On Her Relationship with Jasmin, Rahul & Talks About Getting Scolded By Salman Khan
localized.description:
Bigg Boss 14 Winner, Rubina Dilaik in a candid conversation with CNN News18's Shweta Rashmi spoke about her BB journey. She spoke about how the show mentally affected her, what was Salman Khan's contribution to her journey, and how she tried many times to mend her relationship with Jasmin Bhasin. 
#RubinaDilaik #JasminBhasin #SalmanKhan

► A Glimpse of the Interview 00:00
►On Winning Bigg Boss 14 01:40
► On The Importance Of Mental Health 03:33
► On Jasmin 07:59
► On Rahul Vaidya 12:45
► On Salman Khan 14:32

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 204 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
While Anirudh expresses his displeasure at his uncle for misleading Bondita, he finds Sumati standing at the doorstep covered in dirt. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: Jethalal ने लिया गाँव जाने का फैसला | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3108
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

Suresh Productions (Telugu: సురేష్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్) is a film production company, a subsidiary of Rama Naidu Studios, founded by Dr. D. Ramanaidu. snippet.title: Raghuveera Reddy: వైఎస్, రోశయ్య, కిర‌ణ్‌ల‌ హయాంలో మంత్రిగా చేసిన రఘువీరాను ఇలా ఎప్పుడైనా చూశారా?
snippet.description:
వైఎస్, రోశయ్య, కిరణ్ కుమార్ రెడ్డిల హయాంలో మంత్రిగా చేసిన పీసీసీ మాజీ అధ్యక్షుడు రఘువీరారెడ్డి మోపెడ్‌పై వచ్చి పంచాయతీ ఎన్నికల్లో ఓటు వేయడం అందరి దృష్టినీ ఆకర్షిస్తోంది. #GramPanchayatElections #ExMinisterRaghuveera #BBCTelugu
___________

నోట్: 'బీబీసీ ఇండియన్ స్పోర్ట్స్‌వుమన్ ఆఫ్ ద ఇయర్' (BBC ISWOTY) అవార్డు ఓటింగ్‌లో పాల్గొనేందుకు ఈ లింక్ క్లిక్ చేయండి. https://bbc.in/3tEyfQq 
___________
ఫేస్‌బుక్, ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్, ట్విటర్‌లలో బీబీసీ తెలుగును ఫాలో అవ్వండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్: https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsTelugu 

ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/ 

ట్విటర్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/

snippet.description:
Hidden Detailing Of Drishyam 2 | Unnoticed Things | Duo media

Through this video we are presenting Drishyam 2 Movie Hidden Detailing that may gone unnoticed for the common eye


Drishyam 2: The Resumption, or simply Drishyam 2, is a 2021 Indian Malayalam-language drama thriller film written and directed by Jeethu Joseph and produced by Antony Perumbavoor through the company Aashirvad Cinemas. It is a sequel to their 2013 film Drishyam.

Release date: 19 February 2021 (India)

Director: Jeethu Joseph

Producer: Antony Perumbavoor

Cinematography: Satheesh Kurup

Production company: Aashirvad Cinemas


Six years after the events of the Varun missing case, Georgekutty and his family now live an upgraded lifestyle. Georgekutty is much more wealthier than earlier, as he runs a movie theatre in his township and is also planning to produce a film. Their younger daughter Anu has turned 18 and in the final year of schooling in a residential school. His elder daughter Anju is planning for higher studies, while her mother Rani is desperately trying to arrange her marriage. Anju now suffers from occasional epileptic fits, triggered by extreme stress and Rani still lives in worry. While Georgekutty and Anu have moved on, he has also forbidden any discussion about the incident under his roof. The present wealthy status of the family has made the neighbourhood jealous of them, and the townspeople who once sympathised with Georgekutty are now gossiping and propagating fabricated stories destroying the goodwill of the family.

*No copyright infringement intended*
*This video is for Entertainment purposes only*

You can watch Drishyam 2 via Amazon prime video :- https://www.primevideo.com/detail/0PI0IFOE2K9DGDC2N6YOLYBX4O/ref=atv_dp_share_cu_r

snippet.title: दिशा रवि को बेल, बीजेपी सरकार को झटका।
snippet.description: 21 साल की दशा रवि को आखिरकार बेल मिल गईI क्या उसका गुनाह सिर्फ इतना था कि उसने जलवायु परिवर्तन एक्टिविस्ट ग्रेटा थनबर्ग से बात की थी । उसका दोष सिर्फ इतना था कि उसमें एक तथाकथित टूलकिट में संशोधन किए थे। कहीं न कहीं ये पूरा मामला देश की साख के साथ भी जुड़ गया था। एक तरफ जहां बीजेपी का प्रचार तंत्र , दिशा रवि की 'हरकतों' को 'देशद्रोह' से जोड़ रहा था, वहीं दूसरी तरफ बीजेपी सरकार और दिल्ली पुलिस की इस हरकत से देश की काफी हद तक बदनामी भी हुई थी। आज 'बोल कि लब आजाद हैं तेरे' में वरिष्ठ पत्रकार अभिसार शर्मा बता रहे हैं कि किस तरह से दिशा रवि को बेल का मामला बीजेपी सरकार के मुंह पर करारा तमाचा हैI

snippet.title: World's Biggest Cricket Stadium Tour with RJ Harshil | Ahmedabad
snippet.description:
.The February 24-28 day-night India-England Test is scheduled to take place at the Motera Stadium in Ahmedabad – the world's biggest cricket stadium. The stadium has the capacity of 1,10,000, and its complex has two practice grounds with nine pitches, and another 11 on the central square. RJ Harshil visits the stadium before the match and here's the stadium tour video for you all.

localized.title: World's Biggest Cricket Stadium Tour with RJ Harshil | Ahmedabad
localized.description:
.The February 24-28 day-night India-England Test is scheduled to take place at the Motera Stadium in Ahmedabad – the world's biggest cricket stadium. The stadium has the capacity of 1,10,000, and its complex has two practice grounds with nine pitches, and another 11 on the central square. RJ Harshil visits the stadium before the match and here's the stadium tour video for you all.

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo  ▶ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

Listen the song on; 
Gaana   http://bit.ly/3s4HeJ8
JioSaavn   http://bit.ly/3awVcgU
Wynk    https://wynk.in/u/ZOEtV7A0k
Spotify  http://spoti.fi/2ZtaiOs
Hungama   https://bit.ly/3asEcIW
Amazon Prime Music   https://amzn.to/3pvAEK4
Resso    https://m.resso.app/ZSJJEkJhL/
YT Music   https://bit.ly/2ZplF9R
Apple Music   http://apple.co/3dua1Db



Label:: Saregama India Ltd.

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com

snippet.title: Saare पहुँचे Jetha के घर -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता -Ep 3107 -22nd Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-plans-to-sell-his-shop-1000108979?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3107: Babuji Gets Annoyed
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Gokuldham Society members reach Jethalal's house to calm the situation, Jetha gets shocked seeing everyone at his house. Meanwhile, Babuji comes to know about the entire scenario which been going on for a long.  He fires Jetha for this. Jethalal gets confused and worried as to who told Babuji about the act. Catch the fun and watch the full episode now on SonyLiv.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Soorarai Pottru - Deleted Scene 01 - Maara All Lost | Sudha Kongara | Suriya | 2D Entertainment
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Surya’s  “Soorarai Pottru” deleted scene 01. Amazon’s original movie Surya’s “Soorarai Pottru” is about Maara (Surya), a boy from a remote village dreaming of having his airline service.

Find out the challenges he has to face in this journey to see his dream come true. 2D Entertainment presents a deleted scene as a part of a 100th-day promotion that you shouldn’t miss.

Watch the full movie now. Also, to watch more deleted scenes from the action-drama, subscribe to 2D Entertainment.

Watch Now Soorarai Pottru - https://amzn.to/SooraraiPottru
only on Amazon Prime Video

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 21 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?
